narratives.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन बनाम गाजा में नागरिकों की हत्या, अस्पतालों और स्कूलों पर बमबारी पर अमेरिका और यूरोप के दोहरे मानकों ने इसकी स्थिति को बाकी दुनिया के लिए असुरक्षित बना दिया है।
narratives.reasoning: This quote shifts focus and blame away from Russia's invasion by highlighting the 'double standards' of the US and Europe regarding civilian casualties in other conflicts, implicitly suggesting the West's criticism of Russia is hypocritical and thus deflecting from Russia's responsibility for the war in Ukraine.

narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन बनाम गाजा में नागरिकों की हत्या, अस्पतालों और स्कूलों पर बमबारी पर अमेरिका और यूरोप के दोहरे मानदंडों ने इसकी स्थिति को बाकी दुनिया के लिए असुरक्षित बना दिया है।
narratives.reasoning: The text directly criticizes the US and Europe for their 'double standards' in foreign policy, portraying their diplomatic and moral position as compromised and unreliable to the rest of the world.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader: The West are the aggressors
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन बनाम गाजा में नागरिकों की हत्या, अस्पतालों और स्कूलों पर बमबारी पर अमेरिका और यूरोप के दोहरे मानकों ने इसकी स्थिति को बाकी दुनिया के लिए असुरक्षित बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly shifts blame and responsibility for the conflict's dynamics and global perception onto the West (America and Europe), accusing them of double standards that have undermined their own position. This aligns with the definition of blaming the West for the conflict's escalation and its problematic nature.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West does not care about Ukraine, only about its interests
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन बनाम गाजा में नागरिकों की हत्या, अस्पतालों और स्कूलों पर बमबारी पर अमेरिका और यूरोप के दोहरे मानकों ने इसकी स्थिति को बाकी दुनिया के लिए असुरक्षित बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly accuses the US and Europe of applying 'double standards' by condemning civilian casualties in Ukraine while ignoring or downplaying similar actions elsewhere (Gaza). This frames Western support for Ukraine not as principled concern for Ukraine's fate, but as hypocritical and driven by selective interests, aligning with the subnarrative that the West does not genuinely care about Ukraine.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इस सब में, भारत की स्थिति ने उसकी कूटनीति को सैद्धांतिक नहीं तो सामरिक जीत दिलाई है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement frames India's non-aligned, pragmatic stance as a 'strategic victory' in the context of the Ukraine war. It implicitly discredits the West's diplomatic and moral position by suggesting that a country which has not fully sided with the Western narrative has achieved a superior diplomatic outcome. This supports the parent narrative of discrediting Western diplomacy but does not fit neatly into the other specific subnarrative definitions provided.
